title: callista angustifolia
intro: Callista angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved Callista, is a plant species native to Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Callista angustifolia include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in traditional medicine, where it is often used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
